notes.note: A natural language name identifying the structure definition. This name should be usable as an identifier for the module by machine processing applications such as code generation.

trans-unit.target: Organisasjon

notes.note: A short, descriptive, user-friendly title for the structure definition.

trans-unit.target: Organization

notes.note: The name of the organization or individual responsible for the release and ongoing maintenance of the structure definition.

trans-unit.target: Folkehelseinstituttet

notes.note: The name of an individual to contact.

trans-unit.target: Folkehelseinstituttet

notes.note: The name of an individual to contact.

trans-unit.target: Legemiddelregisteret

notes.note: Text that can be used to describe the constraint in messages identifying that the constraint has been violated.

trans-unit.source: Organisasjon skal ha minst ENH eller RSH identifier
trans-unit.target: Organisasjon skal ha minst ENH eller RSH identifier

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

trans-unit.source: ID fra Nasjonalt register for enheter i spesialisthelsetjenesten (RESH) eller Organisasjonsnummeret i Enhetsregister
trans-unit.target: ID from the Register for Units in Specialist Health Services (RESH) or the organization number in the Register of Legal Entities

notes.note: Explanatory notes and implementation guidance about the data element, including notes about how to use the data properly, exceptions to proper use, etc. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.comment).

trans-unit.target: Where the activity took place.

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

trans-unit.target: Organization number from the Register of Legal Entities (ENH)

notes.note: Explanatory notes and implementation guidance about the data element, including notes about how to use the data properly, exceptions to proper use, etc. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.comment).

trans-unit.source: Identifikatorer skal angis på laveste relevante virksomhetsnivå i henhold til SSBs retningslinjer. For kommunale tjenester betyr dette på institusjonsnivå (f.eks sykehjem) der egen organisatorisk enhet er etablert, ikke på overordnet kommunenivå.
trans-unit.target: Identifiers shall be specified at the lowest relevant organizational level according to Statistics Norway's guidelines. For municipal services, this means at institutional level (for example a nursing home) where a separate organizational unit is established, not at the overarching municipality level.

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

trans-unit.source: ID fra Register for enheter i spesialisthelsetjenesten (RESH)
trans-unit.target: ID from the Register for Units in Specialist Health Services (RESH)

notes.note: Explanatory notes and implementation guidance about the data element, including notes about how to use the data properly, exceptions to proper use, etc. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.comment).

trans-unit.source: Det nivået aktiviteten har skjedd på.
trans-unit.target: The level at which the activity took place.

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

trans-unit.target: Organization type

notes.note: Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.target: Type of organization (for example hospital, department, clinic)

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

trans-unit.target: Organizational designation. Code system "Organizational designation" (OID 8624)

notes.note: Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.source: Kode fra kodeverk "Organisatorisk betegnelse" (OID 8624) som beskriver type organisatorisk enhet (f.eks. sykehus, avdeling, klinikk)
trans-unit.target: Code from the "Organizational designation" code system (OID 8624) describing the type of organizational unit (for example hospital, department, clinic)

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

trans-unit.target: Organization name

notes.note: Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.definition).

trans-unit.target: Official name of the organization

notes.note: Explanatory notes and implementation guidance about the data element, including notes about how to use the data properly, exceptions to proper use, etc. (Note: The text you are reading is specified in ElementDefinition.comment).

trans-unit.source: Kan være navn på post, avdelingsnavn, klinikknavn, sykehusnavn eller sykehjemsnavn
trans-unit.target: Can be the name of a ward, department, clinic, hospital, or nursing home

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

trans-unit.target: Current physical address

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

trans-unit.source: Encoded value for urban district. Code system "Urban district numbers" (OID 3403)
trans-unit.target: Encoded value for urban district. Code system "Urban district numbers" (OID 3403)

notes.note: Provides a complete explanation of the meaning of the data element for human readability. For the case of elements derived from existing elements (e.g. constraints), the definition SHALL be consistent with the base definition, but convey the meaning of the element in the particular context of use of the resource. trans-unit.source: Encoded value for urban district. Codes from the code system "Urban district numbers" (OID 3403) shall be used.
trans-unit.target: Encoded value for urban district. Codes from the code system "Urban district numbers" (OID 3403) shall be used.

trans-unit.source: Kodet verdi for kommune. Koder fra kodeverk "Kommunenummer og regionale spesialkoder" (OID 3402) skal benyttes
trans-unit.target: Encoded municipality value. Codes from the code system "Municipality numbers and regional special codes" (OID 3402) shall be used.
